name: Teacher & Caregiver — Educator Credit, Canada Caregiver Credit, and Home Accessibility Tax Credit
description: Complete Isabella Rossi's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. Her tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\rossi\. Save the completed return as 'isabella_rossi.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Schedule 12 (Home Accessibility Tax Credit) 2024; CRA Line 30450 (Canada Caregiver Credit); CRA Line 46900 (Eligible Educator)
metadata.key_complexity: Eligible Educator School Supply Tax Credit; Dependent profile creation for adult parent; Canada Caregiver Credit; Schedule 12 Home Accessibility Tax Credit with contractor details
